section_miscategorizations.text: Brittany Edwards is a pleasant female with IBS and functional abdominal pain, aggravated by high stress, poor eating habits, and poor sleeping habits.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a diagnostic/synthesis statement summarizing the condition (IBS with functional abdominal pain and aggravating factors), not an objective exam or test finding.

section_miscategorizations.text: Elavil was discussed, but the drawback is that it can make her sleepy.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Discussion of potential neuromodulator therapy and side effects reflects treatment planning rather than patient-reported symptom history.

section_miscategorizations.text: Neuromodulators such as elavil and buspar were discussed but not started.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Content is appropriate to the Plan, but is somewhat redundant with the prior discussion of Elavil in the HPI; organizationally it would be clearer if all medication discussion (including drawbacks) were consolidated here.
